name: AI Travel Agent - Multi Agent with Devil Agent

parameters.formDescription: Fill in your travel details and receive 3 personalized itinerary options via email!

parameters.url: =https://serpapi.com/search?engine=google_flights&departure_id={{ $('Parse Gemini Response').item.json.origin_code }}&arrival_id={{ $('Parse Gemini Response').item.json.destination_code }}&outbound_date={{ $('Parse Gemini Response').item.json.depart_date }}&return_date={{ $('Parse Gemini Response').item.json.return_date }}&currency=USD&adults=1&api_key={{ $('Config').item.json.SERPAPI_KEY }}

=https://serpapi.com/search?engine=google_hotels&q=hotels+in+{{ $('Parse Gemini Response').item.json.destination_city }}&check_in_date={{ $('Parse Gemini Response').item.json.depart_date }}&check_out_date={{ $('Parse Gemini Response').item.json.return_date }}&currency=USD&adults=1&api_key={{ $('Config').item.json.SERPAPI_KEY }}

parameters.subject: =✈️ Your Travel Itinerary to {{ $('Parse Gemini Response').item.json.destination_city }} is Ready!
